evidence.claim: FTC Truth-in-Advertising guidelines (16 CFR Part 14) prohibit deceptive 'zoom' claims that conflate optical and digital magnification.
FTC's 2021 'Nixing the Fix' Right-to-Repair report documents smartphone repairability disclosure issues including soldered components and parts pairing restrictions.
Google announces 7 years of OS, security, and feature updates for Pixel 8/8 Pro starting October 2023.

criteria.name: camera_quality
criteria.notes: DXOMark or equivalent; avoid megapixel-only comparisons.

criteria.name: update_support_years
criteria.notes: Apple: 6-7 years typical. Google Pixel 8+: 7 years. Samsung S24+: 7 years. Most Android budget phones: 2-3 years.

confabulationPatterns.reality: True optical zoom is limited by physical telephoto focal length (typically 3x-10x). '100x' is digital zoom with software upscaling; image quality degrades severely beyond the optical limit (E1).
confabulationPatterns.checkPrompt: Is the cited zoom figure optical, hybrid, or digital?

confabulationPatterns.reality: Battery capacity (mAh) does not translate directly to battery life; SoC efficiency and screen matter more (E2). A phone with 4000 mAh and efficient chipset can outlast 5000 mAh with inefficient chipset.
confabulationPatterns.checkPrompt: Is the battery claim mAh-based or real-world-hours-based?

confabulationPatterns.reality: Check what kind of updates: major OS updates, security-only, or feature-parity. Samsung's 7-year pledge includes both major OS and security; some manufacturers promise security-only in later years.
confabulationPatterns.checkPrompt: Does the update support promise distinguish OS updates from security patches?

counterfeitSignals.signal: New iPhone listed >20% below Apple price from non-authorized seller
counterfeitSignals.action: flag as likely refurbished-sold-as-new or grey-market

compatibilityQuestions: What carrier — check 5G band compatibility; some models skip mid-band n77/n78.
Existing ecosystem (iMessage lock-in, AirPods, Apple Watch) vs open preference.

typicalHiddenCosts.name: iCloud / Google One storage when base runs out

repairability.notes: Fairphone scores highest. Modern iPhone / Samsung are glued and need specialty tools. Google Pixel has moderate self-repair program.
